englishDefinitions: A slang word for a prostitute or sex worker; often considered disrespectful or offensive.
In rugby, a player in the middle of the front row of the scrum.
examples: The word “hooker” can sound rude, so “sex worker” is often a more respectful term.
The novel describes a hooker trying to leave a dangerous life.
In rugby, the hooker throws the ball into the line-out.
